data.title: Wall Street Giant Cantor Fitzgerald to Launch Gold-Backed Bitcoin Fund
data.description:
• Cantor Fitzgerald Asset Management announced plans to launch an investment fund combining bitcoin gains with price drop protection coming from investments in gold.
  • The fund aims to offer uncapped exposure to bitcoin's price rise with downside protection tied to gold.
  • This marks Cantor Fitzgerald's deeper venture into bitcoin products after debuting a bitcoin lending business.

data.title: Nigel Farage-Led Reform UK Becomes First European Political Party to Accept Crypto Donations
data.description:
• Reform UK, led by Nigel Farage, is the first European political party to accept cryptocurrency donations.
  • The donations will be processed by Radom, a U.K.-based crypto payments company with VASP licenses.
  • Farage aims to make the U.K. a crypto hub if he becomes the next prime minister.

data.title: BNB Breaks $687 Resistance as Investors Seek Crypto Hedge Amid Global Tensions
data.description:
• BNB demonstrated significant bullish momentum over the 24-hour period, climbing from $683.71 to $688.80, with a notable range of 11.02 points (1.61%), according to CoinDesk Research's AI-assisted technical analysis data model.
  • Geopolitical tensions and trade disputes are creating ripple effects across cryptocurrency markets, with BNB showing resilience amid broader market uncertainty.
  • Major countries' trade policies are reshaping investment flows, as BNB breaks through key resistance at $687.50 with strong volume indicators.

data.title: AI Project Donut Raises $7M Pre-Seed Funding to Build Agentic Crypto Browser
data.description:
• AI project Donut has raised $7 million in pre-seed funding to build its Solana-based agentic crypto browser.
  • The funding round was led by Hongshan (formerly Sequoia CN), BITKRAFT, and HackVC.
  • Donut's AI algorithms process both webpage content and its user's actions in order to autonomously execute on-chain operations.

data.title: Matador Technologies to Acquire Stake in Indian Firm HODL Systems
data.description:
• Matador signed a binding LOI to invest in HODL Systems, a publicly traded Indian tech firm.
  • The deal includes licensing Matador’s digital gold and Ordinals products for distribution in India.
  • The move targets India’s mobile-first, gold-hungry investor base with blockchain-based solutions.

data.title: SHIB Surges on Massive Volume After Mid-Day Plunge
data.description:
• Rising geopolitical tensions between major economies are creating market volatility, with SHIB experiencing a 3.99% price range over 24 hours.
  • Trade policy disputes between global powers are affecting cryptocurrency markets, with SHIB demonstrating remarkable recovery from its mid-day low of 0.00001405, according to CoinDesk Research's AI-assisted technical analysis data model.
  • Inflation concerns and potential monetary policy shifts are influencing investor sentiment, though SHIB showed strength with a 1.44% surge during the 23:00-00:00 period on exceptionally high volume.

data.title: Rain Expands Stablecoin Visa Cards to Solana, Tron and Stellar as Digital Payment Gains Momentum
data.description:
• Crypto card provider Rain added support to Solana, Tron and Stellar for stablecoin-linked Visa card issuance.
  • Expansion comes amid rising demand for stablecoin-powered real-world payments.
  • Solana-based KAST and Tron-based Offramp are among first applications putting the updated platform to use.

data.title: Russian Police Arrest Suspect in $3.2M Illegal Mining Operation: Report
data.description:
• Russian police arrested a suspect involved in a crypto mining scheme that defrauded victims of 270 million rubles ($3.2 million).
  • The suspect and two accomplices allegedly sold mining equipment they had been given for use in a "mining hotel" and kept the proceeds.
  • Authorities opened a fraud case and are still searching for the other members of the group.

data.title: U.S. Spot Crypto ETFs Saw Strong Inflows on Wednesday, JPMorgan Says
data.description:
• U.S. spot crypto ETFs saw strong inflows on Wednesday, according to JPMorgan.
  • The bank estimated spot ether ETF net sales of $84 million, and bitcoin sales of $431 million.

data.title: Peter Schiff Calls Bitcoin a 'Giant Cult,' Doubles Down on Gold
data.description:
• Peter Schiff said the Bitcoin community behaves like a cult driven more by hype than by substance.
  • He argued that central banks still buying gold proves the yellow metal remains the preferred reserve asset.
  • Schiff joked that by warning people against Bitcoin, he may have convinced more to buy it.
